title: 声音大师试炼
subtitle: 用自己的声音证明你的发现！
learningGoal: 独立发出 /m/、/s/、/a/ 音素——Era 1 综合测试
learningGoalEn: Independently produce /m/, /s/, /a/ phonemes — Era 1 comprehensive test
unlocks: 声音大师认证，解锁 Era 2

hints.text: 还记得你在声音实验室里学到的东西吗？点击一颗水晶，然后用你的嘴巴模仿对应的口型，对它发出声音！
hints.textEn: Remember what you learned in the Sound Lab? Click a crystal, then use your mouth to make the matching sound!

hints.text: 试试看：双唇闭合发出 /m/（像在说'嗯——'），舌尖靠近牙齿发出 /s/（像蛇），张大嘴巴发出 /a/（像医生检查时那样）。
hints.textEn: Try: closed lips for /m/ (like humming), tongue to teeth for /s/ (like a snake), open wide for /a/ (like at the doctor).

failureModes.description: 麦克风未检测到有效声音
failureModes.descriptionEn: No valid sound detected by microphone

failureModes.description: 发出的音素与目标不匹配

introText: 试炼神殿的门在你面前打开。三颗远古水晶沉睡在石台上——它们只对特定的人声产生共鸣。用你在实验室中学到的知识，激活所有三颗水晶！点击一颗水晶，然后对它说出对应的声音。
introTextEn: The trial temple doors open before you. Three ancient crystals rest on stone pedestals — they resonate only to specific human voice frequencies. Use what you learned in the Sound Lab. Click a crystal and speak the matching sound.
victoryText: 三颗水晶全部被点亮！你用自己身体制造的声音激活了远古科技。你不仅是被动的观察者——你就是声音的制造者。Era 1 完成：声音世界已被征服。笔记本提示：'声音可以组合'——前往 Era 2。
victoryTextEn: All three crystals light up! You activated ancient technology with your own voice. You're not just an observer — you are a sound maker. Era 1 complete: The Sound World conquered. Notebook hint: 'Sounds can be combined' — proceed to Era 2.
